Motion To Strike Improper & False Allegatons In First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-31-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MATTHEW E. POPE Motion To Strike Improper & False Allegations In First Amended Complaint:
APPEAR: Helen Shapiro, Esq. 453-7611 for pltf & opposing party; Ruben Sundeen, Esq. 510/663-9240 for deft & moving party.
RULING: Argued and the Court granted the motion to strike with leave to amend as to the estate of Vickie Lee Steinheimer, executors, and language re letter. (302/AJR/RS) Court Reporter Leland Batara, CSR#3759

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-31-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MATTHEW E. POPE DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT:
APPEAR: Helen Shapiro, Esq. 453-7611 for pltf & opposing party; Ruben Sundeen, Esq. 510/663-9240 for deft & moving party.
RULING: Argued and the Court sustained the demurrer with leave to amend as to the 1st cause of action and overruled the demurrer as to the 2nd and 3rd causes of action. (302/AJR/RS) Court Reporter Leland Batara, CSR#3759

DEMURRER
Off Calendar Jun-28-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Helen Shapiro, Esq. 453-7611 for pltf & opposing party; Ruben Sundeen, Esq. 510/663-9240 for deft & moving party Matthew Pope, ind. & as administrator of the estate of Vicki Lee Steinheimer.
RULING: Argued and the Court sustained the demurrer with 30 days leave to amend. Order signed in open court. (JJM/JH)
